{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":10}","has_more":true,"total":20823},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7364447997815096088","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有深度，涉及到很大的一盘棋！如果最亲的人都在算计，生活在这种环境下，没疯都逼疯。感情线，紫玲是败笔，鱼儿等是点睛。张无忌的女人缘。少了韦小宝赢来的女人霸气。如果所有女人都跳出来帮一把。至少，少奋斗几十年。整体感觉，以女人为线，努力为点。串连所有故事。加油！很好看。肥而不腻！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714672343,"group_id":"6569997713717333000","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N590ADjdC1w9kbAooBJq0qdPzg6pL3CWk3127HyNiBoY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3351787038051326","user_name":"随心所欲的苏霸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3351787038051326","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6569997713717333000","book_info":{"abstract":"论潜力，不算天才，可玄功武技，皆可无师自通。论实力，任凭你有万千至宝，但定不敌我界灵大军。我是谁？天下众生视我为修罗，却不知，我以修罗成武神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4df573120c31961c5bc31173adfa4a17","author":"善良的蜜蜂","author_id":"","book_id":"6569997713717333000","book_name":"修罗武神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":258,\"name\":\"传统玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258\u0026name=传统玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u002 id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8wLsyzJEHHX0f4xH0g3O6TBeIGZ+fR9XnGYt9VMTgWB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2344585570031736","user_name":"爱吃豉香蒸鱼的道木易"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2344585570031736","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6569997713717333000","book_info":{"abstract":"论潜力，不算天才，可玄功武技，皆可无师自通。论实力，任凭你有万千至宝，但定不敌我界灵大军。我是谁？天下众生视我为修罗，却不知，我以修罗成武神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4df573120c31961c5bc31173adfa4a17","author":"善良的蜜蜂","author_id":"","book_id":"6569997713717333000","book_name":"修罗武神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":258,\"name\":\"传统玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258\u0026name=传统玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6570539288402870797","read_count":"156691","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"14914532"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"6618","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/4514d9fe5279e661a7e5105cc1d68565~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779167527\u0026x-signature=b96GO2WxKt3sa%2BswIDl%2BCRum8Rk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5214926e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15214,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":26682},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6956954339039183653","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从20年看到现在，一直在持续更新中，相比那些几百章节或一千多章就完结的书，《修罗武神》的情节性不得不说很强，主角楚枫的励志，一步步变得更强让读者印象深刻。从少年，再到成熟，短短数年，经历的，让他的处理更圆滑，每当为他身处困境时的提心吊胆，最后化险为夷让人释然，为了心爱之人的执着，对待朋友的真诚……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1619792159,"group_id":"6569997713717333000","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没有套路，全是情感，随笔，随心而起，不知道会写啥，爱看就看吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1LDSx59pPn52Zn7wKIXLis=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/69c480392a014b8eb6842e8a31780cce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776535655\u0026x-signature=SUDPbty39xRiD4%2F273Z4ctrdBsE%3D","user_id":"888006379575064","user_name":"喜欢鬼脸花的安博士"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"888006379575064","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家
